fullArticle:
Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) is headed to “The Big Friendly.”

Former UFC Middleweight champion Dricus du Plessis collides with former Welterweight champion Kamaru Usman in UFC Oklahoma City’s main event, which takes place next month (Sat., July 18, 2026) inside Paycom Center in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma.

Today, the promotion released UFC Oklahoma City’s official promotional poster on social media.

With UFC so used to delivering basic posters, this one is at least a little more unique. Honestly, it kind of looks like a 1990s movie poster.

Nevertheless, du Plessis (23-3) returns for the first time since losing his 185-pound title to Khamzat Chimaev at UFC 319. Prior to that setback, “DDP” was on a tear, winning nine straight inside the Octagon and 11 straight overall.
